svg.title: RAG document ingestion pipeline for a .txt file
svg.desc: Step-by-step flow showing how a .txt file is loaded, chunked, embedded into vectors, and stored in a vector database

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens when a .txt file is first loaded into RAG?')
sendPrompt('How does RAG split a document into chunks?')
sendPrompt('What is a chunk in RAG?')
sendPrompt('What is a chunk in RAG?')
sendPrompt('What is a chunk in RAG?')
sendPrompt('What is a chunk in RAG?')
sendPrompt('What does an embedding model do in RAG?')
sendPrompt('What does a vector look like in RAG?')
sendPrompt('What metadata is stored alongside a vector in RAG?')
g.text: filename, chunk index, page, raw text snippet

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does a vector database store and index embeddings?')
sendPrompt('How does vector similarity search work at query time in RAG?')
g.text: Query vector vs stored vectors → top-k chunks

svg.text: Click any step to explore it further
